Today, UNIC espresso machine production lines officially join the Aubusson site, home to Dito Sama’s long-established production.
Two brands, two identities, one shared industrial environment. By bringing our production lines together, we strengthen our capabilities, combine our expertise, and build a more efficient and future proof industrial setup.
